CustomField.formula: IF(INCLUDES(leaseworks__Insurance_Certificate_IR__r.leaseworks__Coverages__c,"Hull All risks"),"Hull All risks;",null)& IF(INCLUDES(leaseworks__Insurance_Certificate_IR__r.leaseworks__Coverages__c,"Hull War"),"Hull War;",null)& IF(INCLUDES(leaseworks__Insurance_Certificate_IR__r.leaseworks__Coverages__c,"Legal Liability"),"Legal Liability;",null)& IF(INCLUDES(leaseworks__Insurance_Certificate_IR__r.leaseworks__Coverages__c,"TLO Policy"),"TLO Policy;",null)& IF(INCLUDES(leaseworks__Insurance_Certificate_IR__r.leaseworks__Coverages__c,"Spares All Risk"),"Spares All Risk;",null)& IF(INCLUDES(leaseworks__Insurance_Certificate_IR__r.leaseworks__Coverages__c,"Deductible"),"Deductible;",null)& IF(INCLUDES(leaseworks__Insurance_Certificate_IR__r.leaseworks__Coverages__c,"Excess 3rd Party War"),"Excess 3rd Party War;",null)
CustomField.label: Coverages
